channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Kenya transport strike paused after deadly protests
item.description: Transport operators halt strike over fuel price hikes after several killed and mass arrests.

item.title: Women’s football coach who secretly filmed players banned for life
item.description: Petr Vlachovsky, ⁠a Czech women's football club coach who filmed players in changing rooms, has been banned for life.

item.title: Modi avoids Norway media: How that led to storm over India’s press freedom
item.description: India is currently ranked 157th out of 180 countries in the 2026 World Press Freedom Index.

item.title: Is Russia ‘simulating diplomacy’ because of war losses in Ukraine?
item.description: Putin has talked about a truce, but some analysts say it's a ploy to buy time while Moscow's soldiers are on back foot.

item.title: San Diego mosque shooting: Who were the victims?
item.description: Authorities say victims Amin Abdullah, Mansour Kaziha and Nader Awad played a role in responding to the attackers.

item.title: At least 87 Gaza aid flotilla activists abducted by Israel on hunger strike
item.description: The protest comes after Israeli forces intercepted the last remaining vessel sailing towards the besieged Gaza Strip.

item.title: Putin hails ‘unshakable foundations’ in meeting with China’s Xi
item.description: China’s Xi Jinping has welcomed Russian President Vladimir Putin to Beijing.

item.title: Chinese supertankers exit Hormuz as Trump, Vance talk up Iran deal
item.description: Oil prices ease amid the latest comments from the White House, but experts warn they will stay high even after any deal.

item.title: Iran war day 82: Tehran warns of ‘new fronts’ as Trump sets deadline
item.description: Iran says it learned from past clashes as Trump gives Tehran 'two to three days' to reach a deal.

item.title: Foreign fishing vessels empty Mauritanian waters
item.description: Who is benefiting from the fishing agreements between Mauritania's government and foreign vessels?

item.title: Taiwan’s president says future will not be decided by ‘external forces’
item.description: President Lai says Taiwan's future is up to its people as the island faces Chinese and US headwinds.

item.title: Bangladesh beat Pakistan by 78 runs to clinch historic Test series win
item.description: Taijul Islam's six-for helps Bangladesh bowl out the visitors for 328 in their first home series win over Pakistan.

item.title: UN cuts global growth forecast, blaming Middle East crisis
item.description: UN economists forecast global GDP to grow 2.5 percent in 2026 and 2.8 percent in 2027.

item.title: ‘Cockroach Janta Party’: Top Indian judge’s comment sparks satire, protest
item.description: Controversial remark by Supreme Court chief justice triggers a political movement, with thousands of Gen Z signing in.

item.title: Knicks rally from 22 points down to stun Cavs in overtime
item.description: Jalen Brunson scores 38 points as the New York Knicks beat the Cleveland Cavaliers 115-104 in Game One.

item.title: Jones, Jackson move to Republican primary run-off in Georgia governor race
item.description: Burt Jones and Rick Jackson will face each other again in the June 16 run-off.

item.title: Daughter honours security guard father killed while protecting mosque
item.description: The daughter of mosque security guard Amin Abdullah is remembering him as the “absolute best dad in the world.”

item.title: Fear grips eastern DR Congo amid deadly Ebola outbreak
item.description: From Bukavu to Kinshasa, concern is spreading among residents and street vendors as Ebola cases rise.

item.title: Arsenal fans erupt after team secures Premier League crown
item.description: Arsenal has won the Premier League, ending a 22-year drought.

item.title: China’s Xi Jinping, Russian President Vladimir Putin hold talks in Beijing
item.description: Xi and Putin hold talks just days after US President Donald Trump made an official visit to China.

item.title: Republican Thomas Massie who stood up to Trump defeated in Kentucky primary
item.description: With an estimated 72 percent of the vote counted, Ed Gallrein led with 54.4 percent to Massie’s 45.6 percent.

item.title: Bodies of Italian divers recovered from cave in Maldives
item.description: The bodies of two of five Italian divers who died in a deep underwater cave in the Maldives have been recovered.

item.title: Nigeria says joint US strikes kill 175 ISIL fighters in country’s northeast
item.description: Nigerian Army lauds joint US operation as part of ongoing military campaign to 'hunt down and kill terrorists anywhere'.

item.title: US President Trump, family granted immunity from pending tax audits
item.description: Democratic lawmakers blast move, which follows the establishment of a controversial 'Anti-Weaponization Fund'.

item.title: Vance: US ‘locked and loaded’ for military action if Iran talks fail
item.description: US Vice President JD Vance says the US is prepared to take military action if Iran does not agree to a nuclear deal
